fields.helpText: The value of this field is a string that specifies the name of the service that is called for the application described in the current entry.
The value of this field is a string that specifies the Application Entity Title for the equipment being called for the application that is described in the current entry.
The value of this field is a string that specifies the Application Entity Title for the equipment from which the application is called that is described in the current entry.
The value of this field is a string that specifies the TCP/IP address of the called application entity.

The value of this field is an integer number that identifies the TCP/IP port number to which the equipment connects calls the application that is described in this entry.   TCP/IP port numbers are integers between 1 and 65535.

The value of this parameter is a string. This string can be one of a limited number of values. This value identifies the kind of PACS that hosts the current storage provider.   Supported types are currently: GE (General Electric) and KODAK.

The value of this field is a positive integer number. This number identifies the relative priority of transmissions to the SCP that is described in this record.   This field is optional. If no value is specified, a default value of 500 will be used.
This is the Service Provider Type as entered in the SCU_LIST.DIC file.
